name: Homemade Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Sterilize all equipment in boiling water before use.
2. Bring the milk to a boil, then cool to 100°F.
3. In a small bowl, blend the yogurt with ¼ cup of warm milk.
4. Whisk the mixture back into the warm milk.
5. Pour into a pre-warmed thermos bottle and seal.
6. Set aside in a warm place for 7 hours.
7. Turn the yogurt out into a bowl set in an ice water bath, stirring to quicken cooling.
8. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours, or until thickened.
9. Sweeten to taste if desired, then serve with raspberries.
10. Yogurt will keep for 4 to 5 days when covered and refrigerated.
